title: Pan-Seared Gooey Australian Steak
description: A simple yet flavorful gluten-free steak recipe, seared to perfection and served with a sprinkle of parmesan cheese.
instructions: Preheat your skillet or grill to 400°F (200°C).
Season the steak with salt and black pepper.
Add the olive oil to the preheated skillet and swirl to coat.
Sear the steak for 3-4 minutes per side, or until it reaches your desired level of doneness.
Transfer the steak to a plate and let it rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the steak against the grain and sprinkle with Parmigiano Reggiano cheese.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve immediately.
